feedback.text: Hello! I think the issues that this covers is something that definitely needs to be touched on, considering how much it happens nowdays. I also think that while it's at it, it could include protection from a company removing, destroying, or otherwise make video games unusable after they have been purchased. I also think it might be a good idea to cover ownership of digital goods in general, movies or games. There's not much at the moment for instance that stops a company from just taking a game away from you, such as Ubisoft removing "The Crew" from players libraries.
